creator: markj@FreeBSD.org
text:
This might be a dup of PR 251018, though I do not see any error messages from the sdhci driver to confirm, and that is on rpi3 rather than 4.

I don't have any other ideas.  Of course it may be a software bug, but it's hard to say since there are no driver messages logged in the screenshot.  Has it occurred more than once?  If you scroll up are there any other errors?
